title: Simple recursive length counter
prompt: Write `MyApp.ListLen.len/1` as an explicit recursive function with two function-head clauses: a base matching `[]` returning `0`, and a step matching `[_head | tail]` returning `1 + len(tail)`. Do NOT use `length/1` or `Enum.count/1`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.ListLen do ... end`.
